headline: I'm Amadeus & I'm always trying something new.
bio: Ask anyone — I'm a Product designer based in New York, and in the last year I picked up Salsa, Croatian, Guitar, & Running.
My skills are all connected, trust me.

philosophy.heading: I lead with vision.
philosophy.body: Growing up, I travelled across America performing concerts with my family where I learned that connections are forged through experiences, and honed with passion.

philosophy.heading: I explore everything I can.
philosophy.body: I believe the world has so much to offer, so much to experience. From testing the way that paper folds, to the languages we use to understand each other.

philosophy.heading: Everything I do revolves around people.
philosophy.body: The communities that I have lead, been a part of, and connected with have given me the perspective I use everyday.

roles.title: Product Designer
roles.description: Providing product strategy and design for clients including Viasat. Designed core advertising products for a global satellite provider serving 250M+ passengers annually.

roles.title: Founding Designer
roles.description: Spearheaded end-to-end product strategy and design for a platform with 4M+ followers. Validated hypotheses through rapid prototyping to ensure market fit prior to launch.

roles.title: UX Strategy & Interaction Designer
roles.description: Collaborated with the Head of Creative to design an interactive microsite that transformed fan engagement into actionable data for Paramount+ studios.

roles.title: Experience & Tech Lead
roles.description: Led the UX rapid iteration process for patient experiences and managed web development for the final concept delivery.

items.title: BFA UX Design
items.company: SCAD — Savannah College of Art and Design
items.description: Minor in Mobile and Interactive Design. Awarded 3x Red Dot, 5x Gold Indigo, and 1x European Product Design honors.

items.title: Co-President
items.description: Led the largest UX community at SCAD, coordinating over 100 industry-focused events and growing membership to 300+.

items.title: Co-Director
items.description: Directed a team of 11 to produce a week-long design competition with 350+ participants and $50k+ in industry sponsorship.
